message:
fix: raise profile dropdown z-index above Mission Sidebar (#7981)

The UserProfileDropdown menu used plain Tailwind z-50, while the AI
Mission Sidebar sits at z-modal (400). When the mission sidebar was
open, the profile dropdown opened *behind* it and was unreachable.

Switch to z-toast (500) which is already defined in the z-index scale
as "always on top of modals" — matches the semantic need: a popover
triggered from the navbar should sit above any persistent panel.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -151,7 +151,7 @@ export function UserProfileDropdown({ user, onLogout, onPreferences }: UserProfi
 
       {/* Dropdown menu */}
       {isOpen && (
-        <div id="profile-dropdown-menu" role="menu" className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 max-w-[calc(100vw-1rem)] bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden z-50">
+        <div id="profile-dropdown-menu" role="menu" className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 max-w-[calc(100vw-1rem)] bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden z-toast">
           {/* Header with avatar and name */}
           <div className="p-4 bg-secondary border-b border-border">
             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
